_comment: Speaker notes + per-slide titles for OWASP Porto #12 – Cerberus (19 slides). Loaded by js/notes-loader.js. Sections: Welcome(0-1) · OWASP(2-3) · Porto Chapter(4-8) · Next(9-10) · News(11) · Today's Event(12-14) · Close(15-18).

slides.title: Cover
slides.notes: Hold on the cover while people settle — OWASP Porto #12 – Cerberus, July 15th, 18:00, at 42 Porto. Venue by 42 Porto.

slides.title: Welcome
slides.notes: Welcome everyone to the OWASP Porto Chapter meetup, #12 – Cerberus.

slides.title: About OWASP
slides.notes: One line on what OWASP is: a nonprofit improving software security through open-source projects, conferences and local chapters.

slides.title: Become a Member
slides.notes: Encourage membership; mention the corporate-supporter ask for companies in the room.

slides.title: Mission
slides.notes: Porto Chapter — why we exist / what we do. Keep it brief.

slides.title: Who Are We
slides.notes: Introduce the chapter leads and volunteers; invite the audience to get involved.

slides.title: Resources
slides.notes: Where to find us: site, email, LinkedIn, Luma (subscribe!), Slack, X. Meetup is retiring.

slides.title: Event Archive
slides.notes: 11 events held in Porto so far, from 2024 to May 2026 — point to the event-archive repo for talks, speakers and photos.

slides.title: Call for Talks
slides.notes: We are always looking for speakers — scan the QR or use the link.

slides.title: Name Riddle
slides.notes: Recap the previous one: #11 Déjà vu, because eleven has two 1's (bad pun, own it). This time the cognome is 'Cerberus' — leave the audience guessing why.

slides.title: Next Meetup
slides.notes: Next meetup date still TBD, targeting October/November 2026; venue not yet confirmed — ask for hosts/sponsors.

slides.title: AppSec Days
slides.notes: Promote AppSec Days Portugal (Porto, Sep 23-24, 2026): 500+ participants, keynotes Lukas Weichselbaum (Google) & Petra Vukmirovic (Numan). Sponsors: Diamond Devoteam/NOS/Cloudflare, Platinum Snyk, Gold Checkmarx/Blaze, Silver Celfocus/Infineon/Jscrambler, Community AP2SI, plus Bright Pixel as Speaker Dinner sponsor.

slides.title: Today's Event
slides.notes: Divider — hand over to today's programme.

slides.title: Supported By
slides.notes: Thank 42 Porto for hosting tonight's meetup.

slides.title: Agenda
slides.notes: 18:00 welcome · 18:15 Tânia Esteves (Ransomware in the Wild) · 19:00 Luis Fontes (Poisoned Workspaces) · 20:00 dinner & drinks.

slides.title: Thanks
slides.notes: Thank attendees; we hope they enjoy the event.

slides.title: AppSec Days Voucher
slides.notes: Exclusive perk for the OWASP Porto community: use code OWASP-PORTO at checkout on appsecdays.pt for 25% off OWASP AppSec Days Portugal 2026 (Porto, Sep 23-24). Code is community-only — share it with the room.

slides.title: Feedback
slides.notes: Ask everyone to fill the feedback form — scan the QR (https://forms.gle/7SV6VzUhoMHcCKVE9).

slides.title: Thank You
slides.notes: Close — thank the speakers and 42 Porto once more.
